title: RF-003 DTO Lineage And Downstream Use Audit
objective: Prove declared DTO/projection contracts are actually consumed downstream and block double-dipping/local DTO shaping.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit result identifies declared DTOs, declared projection contracts, downstream use evidence, and findings.
Matching output shape without dtoContractKey/projectionContractKey lineage blocks.
Receipts missing DTO projection evidence block.
nonGoals: Do not promote or reject product features.
Do not scan arbitrary code beyond declared generated surfaces/evidence inputs.
completionPosture: DTO contracts cannot be ornamental; every shape in the execution path must carry lineage or block.
